name: D20 Test
definition: D20 Tests encompass the three main d20 rolls of the game: ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws.
full_text: D20 Tests encompass the three main d20 rolls of the game: ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws. If something in the game affects D20 Tests, it affects all three of these rolls. The DM determines whether a D20 Test is warranted in a given circumstance.
note: If something in the game affects D20 Tests, it affects all three of these rolls
dm_role: The DM determines whether a D20 Test is warranted in a given circumstance
